_meta.description: MITRE ATT&CK technique → Sigma rule templates. Variables: {org_name}, {org_domain}, {cve_id}, {indicator}, {event_type}

rules.title: Web Application Exploitation Attempt — {org_name}
rules.description: Detects common exploitation patterns targeting web applications. Review {org_name} advisories for specific indicators.

rules.title: Suspicious POST to Vulnerable Endpoint — {org_name}
rules.detection:
selection:
    cs-method: 'POST'
    sc-status:
      - 500
      - 502
      - 503
    cs-uri-query|contains:
      - '{indicator}'
    condition: selection
rules.description: Detects suspicious POST requests resulting in server errors, potentially indicating exploitation of {cve_id}.

rules.title: WAF Alert Correlation — {cve_id}
rules.detection:
selection:
    action: 'blocked'
    dst_port:
      - 80
      - 443
      - 8080
      - 8443
    condition: selection | count(src_ip) by dst_ip > 10
rules.description: Correlates WAF blocks that may indicate scanning for {cve_id} across your public-facing infrastructure.

rules.title: Web Shell Activity Detection — {org_name}
rules.description: Detects potential web shell interaction patterns following the {org_name} breach.

rules.title: New File Creation in Web Root — Post-Breach
rules.detection:
selection:
    EventType: 'FileCreate'
    TargetFilename|contains:
      - '\inetpub\wwwroot\'
      - '\htdocs\'
      - '\www\'
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '.php'
      - '.jsp'
      - '.aspx'
    condition: selection
rules.description: Detects new executable files created in web server directories, a common indicator of web shell deployment.

rules.title: Suspicious PowerShell Execution
rules.description: Detects suspicious PowerShell execution patterns commonly used in post-exploitation following vendor compromises.

rules.title: PowerShell Reaching {org_domain}
rules.description: Detects PowerShell scripts communicating with {org_domain}, which may indicate supply chain compromise or C2 callback.

rules.title: Suspicious Shell Command Execution
rules.description: Detects suspicious shell execution patterns associated with remote code execution and post-exploitation.

rules.title: Credential Abuse from Breached Vendor — {org_name}
rules.description: Monitor for authentication attempts using credentials from {org_domain}, potentially exposed in the {org_name} breach.

rules.title: Impossible Travel from {org_name} Accounts
rules.detection:
selection:
    User|endswith:
      - '@{org_domain}'
    EventType: 'login_success'
    condition: selection | near(src_ip, 2, 3600s)
rules.description: Detects successful logins from {org_domain} accounts originating from multiple geographic locations within a short timeframe.

rules.title: Suspicious File Download via Email
rules.description: Detects execution of suspicious processes spawned from email clients, potentially triggered by a phishing attachment.

rules.title: C2 Beacon Detection — HTTP to Suspicious Domain
rules.detection:
selection:
    dst_domain|endswith:
      - '{org_domain}'
    cs-method: 'POST'
    condition: selection | count() by src_ip > 50
rules.description: Detects high-frequency HTTP POST beaconing to {org_domain}, which may indicate compromised endpoints calling back after the {org_name} breach.

rules.title: Anomalous HTTPS Traffic Volume to {org_name}
rules.description: Detects unusually large data transfers to {org_domain}, which could indicate data exfiltration via a compromised channel.

rules.title: Privilege Escalation Attempt Detection
rules.detection:
selection:
    IntegrityLevel: 'High'
    ParentIntegrityLevel: 'Medium'
    Image|endswith:
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
    condition: selection
rules.description: Detects processes spawned with elevated privileges from medium-integrity parents, indicating potential privilege escalation exploitation.

rules.title: Click on Phishing Link from {org_name} Domain
rules.description: Detects users clicking links to {org_domain} from email clients. Following the {org_name} breach, verify legitimacy of any links claiming to be from this vendor.

rules.title: Drive-by Download via Browser — {org_name}
rules.description: Detects browser-spawned process execution typical of drive-by compromise attacks.

rules.title: USB Device Connection Monitoring
rules.description: Monitors for new hardware device connections. Review in context of physical access threats related to the {org_name} incident.

rules.title: DoS Traffic Pattern Detection
rules.detection:
selection:
    dst_port:
      - 80
      - 443
    condition: selection | count(src_ip) by dst_ip > 1000
rules.description: Detects volumetric traffic patterns consistent with denial of service attacks targeting your infrastructure.

rules.title: Suspicious JavaScript Execution via WSH
rules.description: Detects JavaScript execution through Windows Script Host, commonly used for malware delivery.

rules.title: DNS Tunneling Detection — {org_name}
rules.description: Detects unusually long DNS queries to {org_domain} subdomains, a potential indicator of DNS-based data exfiltration or C2 tunneling.

rules.title: Browser Cookie/Credential Store Access
rules.detection:
selection:
    TargetFilename|contains:
      - '\Google\Chrome\User Data\Default\Cookies'
      - '\Google\Chrome\User Data\Default\Login Data'
      - '\Mozilla\Firefox\Profiles\'
    Image|endswith|not:
      - '\chrome.exe'
      - '\firefox.exe'
    condition: selection
rules.description: Detects non-browser processes accessing cookie or credential stores, indicating potential credential theft following the {org_name} breach.

rules.title: DLL Side-Loading Detection
rules.detection:
selection:
    ImageLoaded|endswith:
      - '.dll'
    Image|endswith:
      - '.exe'
    signed: 'false'
    condition: selection
rules.description: Detects unsigned DLLs loaded by legitimate executables, a common technique for persistence and defense evasion.

rules.title: Data Exfiltration to Cloud Storage
rules.description: Detects large file uploads to cloud storage services, which may indicate data exfiltration following the {org_name} incident.

rules.title: Credential Stuffing Attack — {org_name} Breach
rules.detection:
selection:
    EventType: 'login_failure'
    condition: selection | count(User) by src_ip > 20
rules.description: Detects credential stuffing attacks using potentially leaked credentials from the {org_name} breach. High-frequency login failures from a single IP across multiple accounts.

rules.title: Persistence via Registry Run Key
rules.description: Detects modifications to registry run keys for persistence. Review in context of potential compromise from {org_name} supply chain.

rules.title: Ransomware File Encryption Detection
rules.detection:
selection:
    EventType: 'FileRename'
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '.encrypted'
      - '.locked'
      - '.crypt'
      - '.enc'
      - '.ransom'
    condition: selection | count() by Image > 50
rules.description: Detects mass file renaming to encrypted extensions, a strong indicator of active ransomware encryption following the {org_name} ransomware incident.

rules.title: Ransomware Note File Creation
rules.detection:
selection:
    EventType: 'FileCreate'
    TargetFilename|contains:
      - 'README'
      - 'RECOVER'
      - 'DECRYPT'
      - 'RESTORE'
      - 'HOW_TO'
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '.txt'
      - '.html'
      - '.hta'
    condition: selection
rules.description: Detects creation of ransom note files, indicating active ransomware execution.

rules.title: Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
rules.detection:
selection:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'vssadmin delete shadows'
      - 'wmic shadowcopy delete'
      - 'bcdedit /set {default} recoveryenabled no'
    condition: selection
rules.description: Detects deletion of shadow copies, a common pre-encryption step in ransomware attacks.

rules.title: Password Store Access Detection
rules.description: Detects attempts to access Windows credential stores, potentially using credentials exposed in the {org_name} breach to move laterally.

rules.title: Unauthorized Remote Access Tool Detection
rules.description: Detects execution of remote access tools commonly abused by threat actors for persistent access.

rules.title: Suspicious Command Shell Execution
rules.detection:
selection:
    Image|endswith: '\cmd.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '/c whoami'
      - '/c net user'
      - '/c net localgroup'
      - '/c systeminfo'
      - '/c ipconfig /all'
    condition: selection
rules.description: Detects reconnaissance commands via cmd.exe commonly executed during post-exploitation and lateral movement.

rules.title: Monitor Authentication from Breached Vendor — {org_name}
rules.detection:
selection_domain:
    User|endswith:
      - '@{org_domain}'
  selection_failure:
    EventType: 'login_failure'
    condition: selection_domain or selection_failure | count(User) by src_ip > 10
rules.description: Following the {org_name} data breach, monitor for login attempts using potentially compromised credentials. Alert on any authentication from {org_domain} accounts and credential stuffing patterns.

rules.title: Email from Breached {org_name} Domain — Phishing Risk
rules.description: Flag emails with attachments from {org_domain}. Breached organizations are frequently impersonated in follow-up phishing campaigns.

rules.title: Ransomware Indicators — {org_name} Supply Chain
rules.detection:
selection:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'vssadmin delete'
      - 'wmic shadowcopy'
      - 'bcdedit.*recoveryenabled.*no'
      - 'cipher /w'
    condition: selection
rules.description: Following the {org_name} ransomware attack, monitor for ransomware precursor activities: shadow copy deletion, recovery disabling, and secure file wiping.

rules.title: Network Share Enumeration — Lateral Movement Risk
rules.detection:
selection:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'net view'
      - 'net share'
      - 'Get-SmbShare'
    condition: selection
rules.description: Detects network share enumeration typically performed before ransomware propagation across the network.

rules.title: Traffic to Compromised Vendor — {org_name}
rules.description: Monitor all traffic to {org_domain} following the supply chain compromise. Review for unexpected downloads, updates, or beacon patterns.

rules.title: Software Update from {org_name} — Integrity Check
rules.description: Detects software updates originating from {org_name}. Verify update integrity and consider blocking automatic updates until the vendor confirms the supply chain is secured.

rules.title: Data Staging for Exfiltration
rules.detection:
selection:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '7z a'
      - 'rar a'
      - 'tar -czf'
      - 'zip -r'
    condition: selection
rules.description: Detects file compression and archiving that may indicate data staging for exfiltration, a common espionage technique.

rules.title: Exploitation Attempt — {org_name}
rules.description: Monitor for exploitation attempts targeting {cve_id}. Patch immediately if running affected {org_name} products.
